title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Burnt Hair and Soft Power: A Night Out With Evie Magazine
items.description: Evie is a longtime favorite of far-right. At its very first live event, the strength of the publication's politics was in the pretense that it doesn’t...

items.title: Data breach at fintech giant Figure affects close to a million customers
items.description: The Figure data breach allowed hackers to steal customer names, dates of birth, physical addresses, phone numbers, and email addresses.

items.title: Google adds music generation capabilities to the Gemini app
items.description: Users will be able to use text, images, and videos as a reference to generate music

items.title: Big Tech Says Generative AI Will Save the Planet. It Doesn't Offer Much Proof
items.description: A new report finds that of 154 specific claims about how AI will benefit the climate, just a quarter cited academic research. A third included no evid...

items.title: SeatGeek and Spotify team up to offer concert ticket sales inside the music platform
items.description: SeatGeek announced on Wednesday a new integration with Spotify, bringing a seamless ticket-buying experience for Spotify users. Now, when Spotify user...

items.title: A startup called Germ becomes the first private messenger that launches directly from Bluesky’s app
items.description: Social network Bluesky now offers private messaging by integrating the startup Germ's E2E encrypted messenger natively in its app.

items.title: Mastodon, a decentralized alternative to X, plans to target creators with new features
items.description: Mastodon is looking to grow its open source, decentralized social network with new features aimed at creators.

items.title: Snapchat+ tops 25M subscribers, driving company’s direct revenue ARR to $1B
items.description: The revenue milestone comes as Snap has added additional paid offerings outside of its core Snapchat+ subscription over the past year to diversify its...

items.title: The Best Google Pixel Phones of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
items.description: Here’s a guide to all the models—plus Pixel case recommendations and smart software tricks to try.

items.title: Amazon halts Blue Jay robotics project after less than 6 months
items.description: Amazon said Blue Jay's core tech will be used for other robotics projects and the employees who worked on it were moved to other projects.
